prestazioni: Crank the CZGB 4.0L TFSI V8 twin-turbo (420 kW / 572 PS stock) to 700 PS via an APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash with upgraded fueling (Bosch 1050cc injectors, AEM 400 LPH in-tank pump) and a custom downpipe (Supersprint 3.5" catted) paired with a Wagner Evo II intercooler (100% direct-fit, 1200g/s flow rate).

Swap the stock IS38-based turbos for a pair of Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 1.15 A/R) with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and custom CNC-machined turbo manifolds (by Eurocode Motorsport) to eliminate lag and support 800+ PS on 98 RON fuel.

Replace the factory ZF 8HP95X 8-speed torque converter auto with a stand-alone Pankl Racing Systems 8-speed sequential gearbox (dog-ring engagement, 1000 Nm torque capacity) mated to a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch (280mm disc) and a Quaife ATB differential (45% lock) for launch control and flat-shift capability.
estetica: Fit a full Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (RS Q8-specific, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm rear) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom 3D-printed ABS side skirts, and a vented hood (Rieger Tuning) to clear the Wagner intercooler.

Install a full Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system (dual 102mm outlets, electronically controlled valves) with custom heat-wrapped downpipes (DEI Titanium wrap) and a Valvetronic delete for an aggressive 1000Hz V8 bark at 4500 RPM.

Swap the stock 22" wheels for a set of HRE FF16 flow-formed forged wheels (22x10.5 ET35 front, 22x12.5 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 front, 325/25 rear) with custom camber plates (034 Motorsport, -3.5° front, -2.8° rear) and air suspension (Air Lift Performance 3P management with AccuAir ENDO-CVT compressors).
